sentences.target: Je ne veux pas voir de cadavre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nə vø pa vwaʁ də ka.davʁ/

translations.fr: Je ne veux pas voir de cadavre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nə vø pa vwaʁ də ka.davʁ/
translations.en: I don't want to see a corpse.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn thấy xác chết.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke se et lik.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte se ett lik.
translations.ro: Nu vreau să văd un cadavru.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke se et lig.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'veux'.
Preverbal negative particle; pairs with 'pas' to form sentential negation.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; selects the infinitive 'voir' as complement.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne ... pas' negation.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veux'.
Determiner used after negation before a noun (negative/partitive-like), introducing 'cadavre'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'voir'.

sentences.target: Le journal parle d'un cadavre près de la gare.
sentences.reading: /lə ʒuʁnal paʁl dœ̃ ka.davʁ pʁɛ də la gaʁ/

translations.fr: Le journal parle d'un cadavre près de la gare.
translations.ipa: /lə ʒuʁnal paʁl dœ̃ ka.davʁ pʁɛ də la gaʁ/
translations.en: The newspaper talks about a corpse near the station.
translations.es: El periódico habla de un cadáver cerca de la estación.
translations.de: Die Zeitung berichtet über eine Leiche in der Nähe des Bahnhofs.
translations.it: Il giornale parla di un cadavere vicino alla stazione.
translations.ko: 신문은 역 근처의 시신에 대해 보도한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 报纸报道车站附近的一具尸体。
translations.yue: 報紙報導車站附近有一具屍體。
translations.ru: Газета пишет о трупе рядом с вокзалом.
translations.pt: O jornal fala sobre um cadáver perto da estação.
translations.he: העיתון מדווח על גופה ליד התחנה.
translations.tr: Gazete istasyon yakınındaki bir cesetten bahsediyor.
translations.vi: Tờ báo nói về một xác chết gần nhà ga.
translations.ar: الصحيفة تتحدث عن جثة قرب المحطة.
translations.nl: De krant schrijft over een lijk bij het station.
translations.uk: Газета пише про труп біля вокзалу.
translations.hu: Az újság egy holttestről ír a pályaudvar közelében.
translations.hi: अख़बार में स्टेशन के पास एक लाश के बारे में लिखा है.
translations.pl: Gazeta pisze o zwłokach w pobliżu dworca.
translations.el: Η εφημερίδα μιλά για ένα πτώμα κοντά στον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Avisen skriver om et lik nær stasjonen.
translations.id: Surat kabar memberitakan jenazah di dekat stasiun.
translations.sv: Tidningen skriver om ett lik nära stationen.
translations.ro: Ziarul vorbește despre un cadavru lângă gară.
translations.cs: Noviny píší o mrtvole u nádraží.
translations.da: Avisen skriver om et lig nær stationen.
translations.ja: 新聞は駅の近くの死体について報じている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiners 'journal'.
Common masculine noun; subject of 'parle'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a 'de' prepositional complement.
Preposition 'de' in clitic form before vowel; introduces the complement 'un cadavre' of 'parle'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiners 'cadavre'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Adverb forming part of the complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Preposition linking the locative complement noun phrase 'la gare' to 'près'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners 'gare'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'de' in 'près de la gare'.

sentences.target: Il y a un cadavre dans le canal.
sentences.reading: /il ja œ̃ ka.davʁ dɑ̃ lə ka.nal/

translations.fr: Il y a un cadavre dans le canal.
translations.ipa: /il ja œ̃ ka.davʁ dɑ̃ lə ka.nal/
translations.en: There is a corpse in the canal.
translations.es: Hay un cadáver en el canal.
translations.vi: Có một xác chết trong kênh.
translations.nl: Er ligt een lijk in de gracht.
translations.nb: Det ligger et lik i kanalen.
translations.sv: Det ligger ett lik i kanalen.
translations.da: Der ligger et lig i kanalen.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Adverbial clitic pronoun; fixed element of 'il y a' indicating existence/there.
Verb 'avoir', present indicative 3rd person singular; forms the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiners 'cadavre'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'a' in the existential construction (notional subject).
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiners 'canal'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Ils trouvent un cadavre dans la forêt.
sentences.reading: /il tʁuv œ̃ ka.davʁ dɑ̃ la fɔ.ʁɛ/

translations.fr: Ils trouvent un cadavre dans la forêt.
translations.ipa: /il tʁuv œ̃ ka.davʁ dɑ̃ la fɔ.ʁɛ/
translations.en: They find a corpse in the forest.
translations.es: Encuentran un cadáver en el bosque.
translations.de: Sie finden eine Leiche im Wald.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在森林里发现了一具尸体。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺森林裡面發現咗一具屍體。
translations.pt: Eles encontram um cadáver na floresta.
translations.vi: Họ tìm thấy một xác chết trong rừng.
translations.nl: Ze vinden een lijk in het bos.
translations.hi: वे जंगल में एक लाश पाते हैं.
translations.nb: De finner et lik i skogen.
translations.sv: De hittar ett lik i skogen.
translations.ro: Ei găsesc un cadavru în pădure.
translations.da: De finder et lig i skoven.
translations.ja: 彼らは森で死体を見つける。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; masculine or mixed gender; subject of 'trouvent'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiners 'cadavre'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'trouvent'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners 'forêt'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
